headline: The New IQQ ETF Just Started Trading. How to Play the Nasdaq Fund Here.
summary: BlackRock’s new IQQ ETF is officially trading. Investors want to know what the Nasdaq fund offers, who it’s built for, and whether it deserves a spot in your portfolio.

headline: BlackRock cautions buying and holding the S&P 500 is no longer enough for retirement. What they say to do instead
summary: “There needs to be an evolution away from this being indexed only.”

headline: Before BlackRock Became Untouchable, Carl Icahn Told Larry Fink His $4.8 Trillion Empire Was Protecting Bad CEOs— And He Had a $9 Billion Example to Prove It
summary: Carl Icahn blasted Larry Fink and BlackRock in 2015, accusing the asset manager of protecting Motorola's management over shareholders.

headline: BlackRock lists top 10 geopolitical risks
summary: Investing.com -- BlackRock has raised energy security to a high-risk category in its latest geopolitical outlook, warning that the conflict involving Iran has exposed the global economy’s dependence on energy flows through the Strait of Hormuz and could reshape national economic and investment strategies.
